title: ITT's Abundant Prospects a Boon, Persistent Risks a Bane
text: ITT is poised to benefit from a solid momentum across its end markets, acquisition and growth investments. Rising costs and expenses, and forex woes might affect its performance.

title: 4 Stocks to Buy as Durable Goods Orders Continue to Rise
